description: Side panel for editing properties of a selected workflow state or transition. Shows name/label input, state type radio buttons, color swatch picker, and from/to display for transitions. Supports read-only mode.

parameters.name: SelectedState
parameters.description: The currently selected state to edit (null if none).

parameters.name: SelectedTransition
parameters.description: The currently selected transition to edit (null if none).

parameters.name: States
parameters.description: All states, used for displaying From/To names on transitions.

parameters.name: OnStateChanged
parameters.description: Fires when the user saves changes to a state.

parameters.name: OnTransitionChanged
parameters.description: Fires when the user saves changes to a transition.

parameters.name: ReadOnly
parameters.description: Whether the panel is read-only (inputs disabled, no save button).
